gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview.description: Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview — native multimodal image generation and editing
gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview.pricingNotes: Default registry rate is the published Gemini 3.1 Flash Image 1K output-image estimate. Text/image input tokens and other output resolutions are not estimated locally.

gpt-image-1.5.pricingNotes: Default registry rate is the published GPT Image 1.5 1024x1024 medium output-image estimate. Size/quality-specific estimates are handled in the OpenAI image pricing helper; text and image input tokens are not estimated locally.

gpt-image-2.pricingNotes: Default registry rate is the published GPT Image 2 1024x1024 medium output-image estimate. Flexible size/quality estimates are handled in the OpenAI image pricing helper; text and image input tokens are not estimated locally.

grok-imagine-image-quality.description: Grok Imagine Image Quality — higher-fidelity image generation and editing
grok-imagine-image-quality.pricingNotes: Default registry rate is the published 1K output-image price. xAI bills image inputs separately for image editing; local estimates do not count input images.

grok-imagine-image.pricingNotes: Default registry rate is the published 1K output-image price. xAI bills image inputs separately for image editing; local estimates do not count input images.

flux-2-pro.description: FLUX.2 Pro fixed snapshot text-to-image generation
flux-2-pro.pricingTier: BFL FLUX.2 API megapixel pricing reference
flux-2-pro.pricingNotes: BFL FLUX.2 prices scale with model variant, output megapixels, and image inputs. AutoShow keeps a model-level reference estimate for --price; actual provider quotes/usage should override when available. Discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

flux-2-max.pricingTier: BFL FLUX.2 API megapixel pricing reference
flux-2-max.pricingNotes: BFL FLUX.2 prices scale with model variant, output megapixels, and image inputs. AutoShow keeps a model-level reference estimate for --price; actual provider quotes/usage should override when available. Discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

latest.pricingNotes: $10 / 7500 credits; provider usage headers override this fallback when returned
